rateNotes: Official RareCandy per-card odds were behind login. Pull-rate bands approximate digital mystery-pack EV (house edge ~20–40%) using catalog marketPrice; IR/SIR map to Epic in pokemon_catalog.json.
artNotes: Featured tiles reuse Riftbound pack_*.png tier art + rotating chase card overlays (not code-card sealed SKUs).
